title: Transitions in development - an interview with Jan Żylicz.
abstract: Jan Żylicz is an Associate Professor at the Novo Nordisk Foundation Center for Stem Cell Medicine, reNEW, within the University of Copenhagen, Denmark. Jan's work bridges the fields of epigenetics, chromatin and metabolism to understand the metabolic regulation of gene expression in stem cells and development. We met with Jan on Teams to learn more about working abroad, finding a good mentor and his career path so far.
